message:
fix(search): Match Grok doc_id format between embeddings and Tantivy

The Grok message doc_id was generated differently:
- Tantivy: "{chat_id}_{timestamp}_{subsec_nanos}_{sender}"
- Embeddings: "grok_{chat_id}_{idx}"

This caused RRF fusion to fail to recognize matching Grok documents
and get_by_id lookups to fail for semantic-only Grok results.

Now uses the same format as search.rs:344-350.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
